---
title: "Resume"
---

# Mia Cortez

**Email:** [miacortez0924@hotmail.com](mailto:miacortez0924@hotmail.com)  
**Phone:** 760-519-8499  

# Professional Summary

Motivated Business Administration student with a focus in Marketing at Cal Poly Pomona. Experienced in customer service, teamwork, leadership, event support, and fast-paced work environments. Skilled in communication, organization, accountability, and supporting teams through reliable and professional work.

# Technical Skills

- **Marketing & Analytics:** Marketing analytics, Google Analytics 4, data visualization, dashboard design  
- **Software & Tools:** RStudio, Quarto, BigQuery, Looker Studio, Microsoft Office, Google Workspace  
- **Professional Skills:** Customer service, communication, teamwork, organization, problem-solving, leadership  

# Education

| Degree | Year | College / Department | Institution |
|---|---|---|---|
| Business Administration, Marketing | Current Student | College of Business Administration | Cal Poly Pomona |
| High School Diploma | Graduated 2023 | Mission Vista High School | Oceanside, CA |

# Leadership Experience

- Babysitting experience with children below the age of five.
- Teacher assistant leadership experience.
- Team Project Coordinator for class projects by organizing tasks, setting deadlines, and helping the team stay on track.
- AVID student in high school.
- Link Crew leadership student in high school.
- Member of the American Marketing Association at Cal Poly Pomona.

# Leadership Qualities

- Integrity
- Accountability
- Confidence
- Self-awareness
- Willingness to take on difficult tasks
- Ability to work productively with others

# Work Experience

### Sales Floor Support, Nordstrom Rack  
*May 2025 – January 2026*

- Worked with team members to keep the sales floor clean, organized, and visually appealing.
- Helped customers with quick checkouts and online order pickups.
- Prepared returned items to go back onto the sales floor.
- Restocked products so items were available for customers.
- Answered customer questions and provided support when needed.
- Supported daily store goals through teamwork, organization, and customer service.

---

### Student Assistant, Cal Poly Pomona — Centerpointe Dining Hall  
*December 2024 – May 2025*

- Maintained cleanliness and sanitation in the dishwashing area and dining facility.
- Operated commercial dishwashing equipment and handled kitchenware carefully.
- Restocked clean dishes, utensils, and cookware during meal periods.
- Communicated with team members and supervisors to maintain a steady workflow.
- Adapted to a fast-paced environment while managing multiple tasks under pressure.

---

### Student Assistant, Huntley College of Agriculture, Cal Poly Pomona  
*September 2024 – October 2024*

- Assisted with event preparation, organization, and breakdown.
- Helped build and assemble exhibits.
- Supported Huntley College of Agriculture department activities.
- Answered questions from the public about college programs, clubs, and activities.
- Restocked supplies and maintained a clean workspace.
- Completed various tasks during public events.

---

### Front End Team Associate, Walmart  
*April 2022 – July 2023*

- Assisted customers with checkout, product questions, store policies, refunds, and exchanges.
- Operated the cash register and handled cash, credit, and debit transactions accurately.
- Helped maintain clean and organized checkout and front-end areas.
- Supported a positive work environment through communication and teamwork.
- Helped customers enter the store, locate items, and receive assistance when needed.

# Career Interests

- Marketing Analytics
- Digital Marketing
- Consumer Behavior
- Brand Strategy
- Data-Driven Marketing
